# setShowsCompositionNames(_:)

**Instance Method**

Enables  the display of composition names in the composition picker view.

## Declaration

```swift
func setShowsCompositionNames(_ flag: Bool)
```

## Parameters

- **flag**: [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] specifies to show compositions name. The default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Controlling Display of Composition Names

- **showsCompositionNames()**: Retrieves whether composition names can be shown in the composition picker view.
